title: Add documentation under /docs
description: Add the initial product, requirements, architecture, AI pipeline, data model, deployment, backlog, and workflow documentation under /docs.
acceptance_criteria: Docs exist in /docs; documentation index links to current docs; GitHub Issues workflow is not used.
notes: Completed before Beads initialization; retained as a closed task because later setup depends on project documentation.

title: Initialize monorepo structure
description: Create the repository structure for frontend, backend, infra, scripts, Docker Compose files, .editorconfig, .env.example, and AGENTS.md.
acceptance_criteria: Expected directories and root config files exist; structure follows docs/07_REPOSITORY_AND_DEPLOYMENT.md; no feature implementation is included.
notes: Started on feature/mvp. Scope for this iteration: create the repository skeleton and root configuration only; no service implementation.
close_reason: Created monorepo skeleton directories, root editor/env/compose placeholders, and README entry point. No service implementation included.

title: Create Docker Compose baseline
description: Create local Docker Compose baseline for frontend, api, processing-service, postgres, nats, seaweedfs, and optional nginx wiring.
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose.yml exists; services and volumes are declared; local ports are documented or represented in .env.example.
notes: Started on feature/mvp after monorepo skeleton review. Scope: define Docker Compose baseline and environment defaults only; no application service implementation.
close_reason: Defined Docker Compose baseline for frontend, API, ProcessingService, PostgreSQL, NATS JetStream, SeaweedFS, nginx, named volumes, and local/production overrides. Validated local and production compose merges with docker-compose config.

title: Create frontend Next.js app
description: Create the Next.js TypeScript frontend app using Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui conventions.
acceptance_criteria: Frontend runs locally; basic app shell renders; project fits src/frontend monorepo layout.

title: Create .NET API service skeleton
description: Create AutoVerdict.Api as an ASP.NET Core Minimal API project.
acceptance_criteria: API project builds; exposes a health endpoint; uses configuration conventions for environment variables.
notes: Started on feature/mvp. Scope: .NET 10 Minimal API skeleton, health endpoint, solution entry, and API Dockerfile only.
close_reason: Created .NET 10 Minimal API project, added it to AutoVerdict.sln, exposed /health, added API Dockerfile, and verified dotnet build plus local /health smoke test.

title: Create .NET ProcessingService skeleton
description: Create AutoVerdict.ProcessingService as a separate .NET worker service.
acceptance_criteria: Worker project builds; has structured startup; exposes or supports health checks where applicable.
notes: Started on feature/mvp. Scope: .NET 10 worker skeleton, solution entry, and ProcessingService Dockerfile only.
close_reason: Created .NET 10 Worker Service project, added it to AutoVerdict.sln, added ProcessingService Dockerfile, and verified the backend solution builds cleanly.

title: Add shared backend contracts and configuration conventions
description: Create shared backend projects/contracts for DTOs, message contracts, report schema, and configuration conventions.
acceptance_criteria: Shared contracts compile; API and ProcessingService can reference them; no provider-specific business logic leaks into contracts.

title: Add PostgreSQL service and connection configuration
description: Add PostgreSQL Docker service and backend connection configuration with EF Core foundation.
acceptance_criteria: PostgreSQL service runs in Compose; backend can read DB config; initial DbContext/migration setup exists.
notes: Started on feature/mvp. Scope: PostgreSQL/EF Core foundation, connection configuration, and buildable infrastructure project.
close_reason: Added AutoVerdict.Infrastructure with EF Core/Npgsql AppDbContext, design-time DbContext factory, migration folder setup, API infrastructure registration, and development PostgreSQL connection defaults. Verified docker-compose config, backend build, and API /health smoke test.

title: Add NATS JetStream service and configuration
description: Add NATS JetStream service and stream/consumer configuration foundation.
acceptance_criteria: NATS service runs in Compose with JetStream persistence; stream subject conventions are documented/configured.

title: Add SeaweedFS service and S3-compatible configuration
description: Add SeaweedFS object storage service with S3-compatible endpoint configuration.
acceptance_criteria: SeaweedFS runs in Compose; S3 endpoint/bucket/access configuration is represented; storage is not public by default.

title: Implement backend-owned Google authentication skeleton
description: Implement backend-owned authentication skeleton for Google OAuth, local user mapping, and backend-issued auth cookie or JWT.
acceptance_criteria: Frontend-owned auth is not used; API owns login/session primitives; authenticated endpoints can resolve current user.

title: Implement user and credit data model
description: Implement users, external auth accounts, user_credits, and credit_ledger persistence.
acceptance_criteria: EF model/migrations exist; initial free credit grant can be represented transactionally; balance cannot become negative.

title: Implement car check creation transaction
description: Implement check creation with atomic credit consumption, input persistence, uploaded file metadata persistence, and outbox insertion.
acceptance_criteria: A queued check cannot be created without consuming a credit; a credit cannot be consumed without creating check and outbox records.

title: Implement API-mediated file upload to SeaweedFS
description: Implement API-mediated screenshot upload validation, object storage abstraction, SeaweedFS/S3 adapter, and uploaded file metadata persistence.
acceptance_criteria: API validates content type, size, and count; files are stored through IObjectStorage; metadata is persisted in PostgreSQL.

title: Implement transactional outbox
description: Implement outbox_messages persistence and transactional insertion during check creation.
acceptance_criteria: Outbox records are written in the same transaction as check creation and credit consumption; unpublished messages can be queried safely.

title: Implement NATS publisher
description: Implement outbox publisher loop that publishes pending car-check analysis commands to NATS JetStream.
acceptance_criteria: Pending outbox messages publish to NATS; published messages are marked; retries and errors are recorded.

title: Implement ProcessingService NATS consumer
description: Implement durable NATS JetStream consumer and inbox/idempotency handling in ProcessingService.
acceptance_criteria: ProcessingService consumes analysis commands; duplicate messages do not create duplicate processing/report records.

title: Implement Claude AI provider abstraction
description: Define IAiAnalysisProvider and Claude provider boundary without binding business logic directly to Claude.
acceptance_criteria: Provider abstraction compiles; Claude implementation is configurable; provider metadata can be recorded.

title: Implement initial Claude analysis pipeline
description: Build the first English Claude prompt and analysis pipeline for normalized car listing input and screenshots.
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline calls Claude through abstraction; output is constrained to the structured report schema; raw prompts/output are not stored by default.

title: Implement structured report persistence
description: Persist validated structured AI reports and AI request metadata.
acceptance_criteria: car_reports and ai_requests are persisted; invalid AI JSON after retries is handled as a technical failure.

title: Implement report status and report retrieval endpoints
description: Expose authenticated endpoints for check list, check details, status, and completed report retrieval.
acceptance_criteria: Users can only access their own checks/reports; failed checks expose safe failure state; completed reports return structured data.

title: Implement basic frontend dashboard
description: Implement authenticated frontend dashboard shell for credits, check creation, history, status, and report display.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard calls backend APIs; shows credit balance, previous checks, processing status, and completed report view.

title: Implement free-check lifecycle end to end
description: Wire registration, free credits, check creation, upload, outbox, processing, Claude report generation, and report display into one working MVP flow.
acceptance_criteria: A new user can use a free credit to submit a check and view a generated report; technical failures are represented and refundable where classified.

title: Add Stripe Checkout for one check and five-check package
description: Add Stripe Checkout and webhook handling for single-check and five-check credit purchases after the free-check lifecycle works.
acceptance_criteria: Checkout session creation exists; webhook signatures are verified; credits are granted idempotently from webhook events.
